items.title: Surfingkeys Update
items.text: Update SurfingKeys configuration with the Catppuccin Mocha theme. Uses gum prompts to confirm and report the copy operation.

items.title: Functions
items.text: • sktu: Copy the theme file into the SurfingKeys config directory.

items.title: Changelog
items.text: All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. See commit-and-tag-version for commit guidelines.

items.title: Bug Fixes
items.text: • function: bypass cp prompt after gum confirm (3942fb6)

items.title: Bug Fixes
items.text: • function: fix full directory in copy command (6d33199)
